items.title: Breaking Down Jamie Dimon’s Investing Letter
items.summary: The Motley Fool discusses Jamie Dimon's annual shareholder letter for JPMorgan Chase, highlighting his warnings about private credit markets and criticism of Basel III regulations. The episode also covers Bill Ackman's latest attempt to acquire Universal Music Group for $60 billion and examines whether following famous investors' stock picks is a viable strategy. Additionally, the hosts analyze covered call ETFs like JEPQ, noting their high yields come with tax headwinds and capped upside potential.

items.title: GraniteShares Announces Reverse Split of MRAL, MSTP, and SMCL
items.summary: GraniteShares announced reverse share splits for three 2x leveraged daily ETFs effective April 30, 2026. MRAL will execute a 1-for-10 reverse split, while MSTP and SMCL will execute 1-for-20 reverse splits. The splits will increase per-share NAV and price while maintaining total shareholder investment value. Fractional shares will be redeemed at split-adjusted NAV with no transaction fees.
